groups.label: Species
groups.hint: Base species: sets the core look in every render, which feature groups apply, and the suggested surface.

groups._note: Same list as race (V2 A7); class metadata lives on race only - visible_when conditions read race.
groups.label: Second Heritage
groups._required_note: O3_INPUTS N3: required added by the O3 planning gate (2026-07-22), completing the convention that every must-priority group is required-when-visible.
groups.hint: A second heritage blended into the prompt. Surface and features stay your choice.

groups._render_note: The image-prompt subject anchor (solo, 1girl/1boy/1other) is derived from this field in code (prompt.py); emitting the option fragment too would double the token.
groups.label: Gender Presentation
groups.hint: Sets how renders are framed (feminine / masculine / androgynous subject). Identity and pronouns are chat-side only.

groups._note: V2 A4: every band is adult; exists for the elf/vampire/android case where looks differ from years. 5.7 (user sign-off 2026-07-18, reopening 2026-07-16): quick, header-hosted next to Age, auto-defaulted from the entered age on CREATE only - a manual pick always wins, edits never auto-fill.
groups.label: Apparent Age
groups._required_note: O3_INPUTS N3: required added by the O3 planning gate (2026-07-22), completing the convention that every must-priority group is required-when-visible.
groups.hint: Drives the visible age in every image. The Age number is the hard adult anchor and library display; this band is what actually renders.

groups.label: True Age Is…
groups.hint: Chat-side lore (how old they really are). Never rendered.

options.label: Older by Decades
options.chat_text: older than they look by decades

options.label: Unknown Even to Them
options.chat_text: true age unknown even to them

groups._note: V2 A11: narrative flavor only - the day job lives in D7 occupation (5.6d). Kind changed tags->single per A11; legacy tag values load leniently and lint. 5.7 (user decision 2026-07-18): relabeled 'Class' (id + options untouched - these ARE class-like by design); the personality axis is the new personality_archetype in 50_mind.json. 5.7 UI pass (user decision 2026-07-18): render:false + untiered - the class no longer enters image prompts (wardrobe carries the look, matching occupation's D7 rule); label stays 'Class', not 'Job' - Occupation owns the day-job axis. Options gain genre classes for grouped-picker subsections; seven genre fill-ins appended.
groups.label: Class
groups.hint: Narrative class flavor, grouped by genre. Chat-side only - the rendered look comes from Wardrobe and Accessories; the day job lives in Occupation.
